library_preparation_preflight.summary: The artifact is a small Scala 3 MockitoSugar wrapper over transitive mockito-core 5.12.0; no extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed, but meaningful native-image-friendly Mockito coverage should avoid Mockito's bytecode-generating mock makers.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Add test resource `src/test/resources/mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker` with content `mock-maker-proxy` so Mockito uses its proxy mock maker. Write coverage around `org.scalatestplus.mockito.MockitoSugar` by mocking Scala traits or Java interfaces only, and exercise `mock[T]`, named/default-answer/settings overloads, and `capture[T]`; avoid class/final-class mocks because the proxy mock maker only supports interfaces/traits.
risks: Using Mockito's default or inline/subclass mock maker may require runtime bytecode generation or agent facilities that are unsuitable for native-image tests.
The proxy mock maker cannot mock concrete classes, so generated tests must model collaborators as traits/interfaces.
Native-image verification may still require proxy metadata for any user-defined mocked interfaces; local Gradle and native-image runs remain authoritative.
